prompt_text:
### Demographics: 59-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 1 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
Fibrosis
Body mass index category: Normal
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Fibrosis; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~11.2 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 63.9 kg; Height 174.4 cm; BMI 21.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 124/68 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.1%; 9 months ago 8.7%; 6 months ago 8.2%; 3 months ago 7.7%; current 5.8%), FPG (12 months ago 193mg/dL; 9 months ago 218mg/dL; 6 months ago 184mg/dL; 3 months ago 191mg/dL; current 111mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 63.9kg; 9 months ago 65.3kg; 6 months ago 64.8kg; 3 months ago 62.8kg; current 63.9kg), Height (12 months ago 174.4cm; 9 months ago 174.4cm; 6 months ago 174.4cm; 3 months ago 174.4cm; current 174.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 21.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 121mmHg; 9 months ago 123mmHg; 6 months ago 123mmHg; 3 months ago 122mmHg; current 124mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 70mmHg; 9 months ago 69mmHg; 6 months ago 70mmHg; 3 months ago 70mmHg; current 68mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 54U/L; 9 months ago 54U/L; 6 months ago 45U/L; 3 months ago 53U/L; current 49U/L), AST (12 months ago 66U/L; 9 months ago 72U/L; 6 months ago 67U/L; 3 months ago 72U/L; current 67U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.9mg/dL; current 1.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 7.8mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 6.5mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 8.4mL/min/1.73m²; current 7mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 584mg/g; 9 months ago 600mg/g; 6 months ago 764mg/g; 3 months ago 725mg/g; current 627mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 77mg/dL; 9 months ago 76mg/dL; 6 months ago 74mg/dL; 3 months ago 76mg/dL; current 75mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 54mg/dL; 9 months ago 57mg/dL; 6 months ago 57mg/dL; 3 months ago 57mg/dL; current 55mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 126mg/dL; 9 months ago 124mg/dL; 6 months ago 126mg/dL; 3 months ago 123mg/dL; current 116mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.0g/dL; 6 months ago 9.5g/dL; 3 months ago 9.8g/dL; current 9.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.46 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
